signals.headline: Suns Rout Thunder 135-103 in Regular Season Finale with Reserves; OKC Locks No
signals.raw:
Suns Rout Thunder 135-103 in Regular Season Finale with Reserves; OKC Locks No. 1 Seed (64-18 Record)** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][6]

The Oklahoma City Thunder concluded the 2025-26 NBA regular season with a league-best **64-18 record**, securing the top overall seed in the playoffs despite a lopsided loss to Phoenix Suns reserves on Sunday; both teams rested starters as seeding was locked[1][6].

signals.headline: Duke Rodriguez Announces Republican Bid for New Mexico Governor | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Duke Rodriguez Announces Republican Bid for New Mexico Governor | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Cannabis entrepreneur and former state cabinet secretary Duke Rodriguez officially launched his campaign for the Republican nomination for New Mexico governor via newspaper ads over the weekend of December 13-14, 2025, joining candidates like Rio Rancho Mayor Gregg Hull and state Sen. Steve Lanier.[1][2][3]
